prompt: Create a realistic candid smartphone photo of a young woman at an outdoor city event, shot from a close slightly high-angle perspective with a wide-angle lens. She is leaning playfully toward the camera, making a sideways peace sign beside her face with her right hand, while her left arm hangs down. Her face is intentionally covered by a flat opaque square censor block in a muted skin-tone color. She has a high messy ponytail with pink peach hair with a small teal-blue streak, loose wispy strands, small earrings, rings, and glossy decorated nails. She wears a fitted dark indigo denim halter overall jumpsuit with visible seams, structured bust cups, thick straps, and a snug waist, giving an energetic street-fashion look. The background is an outdoor festival or expo entrance on asphalt, with white peaked event tents, blue crowd-control railings, scattered pedestrians slightly motion-blurred, tall modern apartment towers, cloudy daylight sky, and shallow depth of field. Use natural lighting, realistic skin texture, casual Japanese urban atmosphere, vertical 2:3 composition, candid social-media photo style, no text, no watermark.
